intent: Classify the source-only assets-src family backlog into active-source, retain/promote, custody, or archive-gate dispositions before any archive move.
source_rule: Source-only disposition is review evidence only. It does not approve archive moves, deletion, runtime sync, receipt writes, or deploys.
required_next_gate: Use active-source rows as keep/promote metadata work, not archive work.
Use archive-gate mirror rows only after exact plan approval and fresh preflight.
Resolve legacy and custody rows in separate promotion/retain/rehome lanes.
Rerun the mapper after any disposition decision and verify this report still has zero executable rows.
